# The Red Roofer

> Professional roofing contractor and handyman services in Colorado Springs, CO serving the Pikes Peak region.

The Red Roofer is a family-owned roofing contractor based in Colorado Springs, CO. We provide expert roof repairs, installations, inspections, gutter services, handyman work, fencing, landscaping, and chimney services across the Pikes Peak region.

## Pages

- [Home](https://theredroofer.com/): Overview of services, reviews, and service areas
- [Gallery](https://theredroofer.com/gallery/): Photos of completed roofing and home repair projects
- [Calculator](https://theredroofer.com/calculator/): Roof replacement cost estimator
- [Service Areas](https://theredroofer.com/locations/): Cities we serve in the Pikes Peak region
- [Contact](https://theredroofer.com/contact/): Contact form and business information
